name: property managers processing 5–15 maintenance requests/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 maintenance requests/month, inadequate maintenance causes costly emergency repairs. We recommend preventative repairs instead of manual tracking of maintenance history.
problem_solved: Inadequate maintenance leading to emergency repairs
